response.justification: Szabo brings strong engineering fundamentals—18+ years of experience, Staff-level tenure at Naver and Tencent, proficiency across all required languages, and demonstrated ability to architect systems at scale (millions of requests/transactions). However, this role's core mission is designing experimentation platforms and measurement systems, and the resume contains no evidence of A/B testing frameworks, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, bias detection, feature flagging, or rollout-risk management—all critical to the position. While his systems-thinking and hands-on technical leadership suggest he could learn the domain, the absence of experimentation platform experience creates significant uncertainty for a Principal-level hire who should drive this capability.
strengths: 18+ years of sustained technical growth with Staff-level roles; recent position at Naver shows hands-on engagement with AI infrastructure and code generation frameworks
Proficient across all required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Java, C#) with proven track record scaling systems to millions of transactions/requests
Demonstrated ability to architect across diverse domains (real-time systems, GIS platforms, mobile apps, embedded systems), suggesting strong systems-thinking and adaptability
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or metrics/telemetry infrastructure—the core responsibility of this role
Resume lacks evidence of feature flagging systems, bias detection, rollout-risk management, or statistical/experimental design work—all central to growth and experimentation systems
No clear track record of growth-focused measurement platforms or multi-team experimentation initiatives; unclear experience collaborating with data science and product teams on measurement strategy

key_factors.factor: Proven ability to architect and ship systems at scale
Recent engagement with AI infrastructure and emerging tooling
